title: The Hadamard Gate: Gateway to Superposition
description: Deep dive into the Hadamard gate - the most important single-qubit gate that creates superposition and enables quantum parallelism.
learningObjectives: Understand the Hadamard gate's role in creating superposition
Apply Hadamard to basis and superposition states
Visualize Hadamard operation on the Bloch sphere
Master key properties: H² = I, eigenvalues, eigenvectors
